name: efficient_planning_batch_finance_context
notes: Efficient planning, Finance-advisory flavor: ONE message packs the relevant facts (how long cash flow's been tight, roughly how many unpaid invoices, which clients) AND the compound ask (check cash flow + draft reminders) at once. The manager should use analyze_cash_flow / propose_payment_reminder against the given facts rather than re-collecting them turn by turn. Setup: `setup --onboarded --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> efficient_planning_batch_finance_context.json`.

steps.message: My cash flow's been tight the last two months — I've got around 12 unpaid invoices sitting there, mostly from two big regular clients. Can you check what's going on and draft reminders for the worst ones?
assert_not_contains: how many unpaid invoices do you have
how long has your cash flow been tight
how many months has this been going on
steps.note: Facts (timeframe, invoice count, client concentration) AND the ask, all in one message. Expect the manager to engage the finance read + reminder draft using what was given — never re-ask for facts already stated.
